clusters.title: Shop Pay outage on iOS Safari checkout

top_epic.title: Stabilize Shop Pay checkout on iOS Safari
top_epic.rationale: Across 2,410 signals from merchants, support tickets and the Shop app store, the dominant pattern is Shop Pay silently failing on iOS Safari since the address-autocomplete rollout. Mobile checkout abandonment is up 4.3pp week-over-week and concentrates in this cohort.
top_epic.verdict: Revenue-blocking — every hour of drift costs Plus merchants real GMV.
top_epic.recommendation: Roll back the address-autocomplete change behind a flag, then re-roll forward with iOS Safari isolated.
acceptance_criteria: Detect address-autocomplete failure on iOS Safari and fall back to manual entry
Add a per-region kill switch for the autocomplete experiment
Surface checkout abandonment delta to the merchant dashboard within 15 min
Backfill Shop Pay session if autocomplete crashes mid-flow

evidence.quote: We lost $14k in sales today because Shop Pay stopped letting customers complete checkout.
Checkout abandoning at the shipping step, only on iOS Safari, since the new autocomplete.
Mobile abandonment up 4.3pp WoW, isolated to iOS 18 Shop Pay flow.

confluence.title: PRD · Shop Pay iOS Safari resilience
